summary: The 2026-03-27 final ERP-21 gate_release rerun reached verify_local and then failed on repo-wide Spotless drift outside the ERP-21 portal-split packet.

proof.message: Spotless.Java reported 31 files needing formatting and stopped the release gate before the strict release truthsuite and migration-matrix stages.
proof.scopeReason: The failing files are outside the ERP-21 host-split artifact set and match the mission's pre-classified repo-wide Spotless drift.
proof.suggestedOwner: Keep this blocker classified separately from ERP-21 and clear the repo-wide Spotless backlog before treating gate-release as green for merge readiness.
